Allow: /
Allow: /login
Allow: /register
Allow: /terms
Allow: /privacy

# Keep authenticated app pages private
Disallow: /scan
Disallow: /tickets
Disallow: /nearby
Disallow: /draws
Disallow: /stats
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /business
Disallow: /subscription
